message:
feat(hedge): replace Phase 0 passthrough with real timer-based hedging and pending slot management

Replace the stub HedgeFuture (which simply forwarded the primary
request) with a real hedging implementation that issues a second request
after a configurable delay if the primary hasn't completed.

HedgeConfig:
  - Add time_getter field (fn() -> Time) for injectable time sources,
    defaulting to wall_now(). with_time_getter() builder method and
    time_getter() accessor added.

HedgeStats:
  - Now Arc-shared across clones (was previously reset on each clone,
    losing counters). Tracks total, hedged, hedge_wins, and a new
    pending counter for slot management.
  - try_acquire_pending_slot(): CAS loop enforces max_pending limit,
    preventing unbounded hedge fan-out under load
  - release_pending_slot(): saturating decrement on completion
  - finish_started_hedge(): records win/loss and releases slot
  - record_hedge(): increments hedged counter

HedgeFuture<S, Request> (was HedgeFuture<F>):
  - Three-phase state machine: Primary (waiting for delay timer),
    Racing (both primary and hedge in flight), Settled (one completed)
  - Primary phase: polls the primary future; if it completes before the
    delay timer fires, returns immediately. When the timer fires and a
    pending slot is acquired, clones the service, issues the hedge
    request, and transitions to Racing.
  - Racing phase: polls both futures; whichever completes first wins.
    The loser is dropped. Stats record whether the hedge won.
  - Sleep timer uses crate::time::Sleep for async delay
  - Service bound changed to require Clone + Unpin; Request requires
    Clone + Unpin; S::Future requires Unpin

Tests added:
  - hedge_fires_after_delay: verifies hedge is issued when primary is
    slow, hedge wins, stats reflect correctly
  - hedge_not_needed: primary completes before delay, no hedge issued
  - pending_slot_limits: max_pending=0 prevents all hedges;
    try_acquire respects the limit
  - clone_shares_stats: Arc sharing verified across clones
  - custom_time_getter: injectable time source works

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
